programmes.show_description: Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
19/21. To find the best flowers for Mama and Papa, Oona and Baba follow some bees. Gus na lusan as fheàrr fhaighinn 'son mamaidh is Papaidh, the Oona is Baba a' leanail sheilleanan.
20/21. Baba has a swimming lesson with Oona. Diving proves difficult - but Baba is determined! Tha leasan snàimh aig baba còmhla ri Oona. Tha daibheadh na dhùbhlan - ach tha Baba daingeann!
3/40. Tha Boban a' toirt ponaigeadh sònraichte do dh'Fhuigheag gus am faigh e air a dhealbh a tharraing. Boban makes Fuigheag look extra nice so that he can paint his perfect picture.
13/15. Eilidh visits Emily and her adorable rabbits, Syrius and Seumas, as we get to find out how to look after rabbits.
33/52. Chan eil AH-AH ann an deagh shunnd an-diugh agus, gu dearbh', tha e gabhaltach. AH-AH isn't in a good mood and it seems to be contagious.
9/52. Tha Posy ag iarraidh itealag Pip fheuchainn ach chan eil cùisean a dol leatha! Posy want to try Pip's kite but things don't go her way!
10/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' togail shadhbhaidhean ach chan eil iad idir rèidh le chèile. Pip and Posy are den-building, but they're not getting on with one another.
81/82. A bedtime story for young children. Derek MacIntosh reads Mgr Pusskins Buannaiche na Fèille, written and illustrated by Sam Lloyd and translated into Gaelic by Jo MacDonald.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 39/52. Tha Stella a' cur àm teaghlaich seachad le Molaidh aig a' phàirc-spèilidh. Stella spends some family time with Molly at the skate park.
...Ath-dhoras/The Royals Next Door. 40/52. Tha Stella a' cluinntinn gusgal mu Mhgr. Bruno. Ach bheil e fìor? Stella hears gossip about Mgr Bruno. But is it true?
...Gumbalan/Bottersnikes and Gumbles. 40/52. Tha Bonns fo bhruid an-diugh. Bonns is kidnapped today.
9/13. Tha Na Neachdan air an glacadh ann an cuartan -  's chan eil iad leotha fhèin! The Neachdan are trapped in a maze, and they are not alone!
3/5. Iagan MacNeil explores the Fife Coastal Path, from Dysart to Elie. Tha Iagan MacNèill a'coiseachd cladach Fìobha, bhon Dìseart gu Ealaidh.
9/13. Calum Maclean is on Scotland's east coast where he's hoping to have smoked fish for lunch.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
1/6. Join Peter as he starts work on the house and travels to a crofting stronghold in Lewis. Thigibh cuide ri Pàdruig 's e tòiseachadh a' togail taigh agus a' siubhal gu Leòdhas.
2/3. Turas fèin-aithne dha boireannach Dhubh tar-ghnèitheach ann am Brasil. A journey of self-discovery for a black trans woman in Brazil.
13/33. An seinneadair aithnichte Albannach Rianne Downey le seisean acoustic aig Belladrum 2025. Acclaimed Scottish singer Rianne Downey performs an acoustic session at Belladrum.
4/6. Julie Fowlis agus Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh le taghadh ciùil bho Transatlantic Sessions. Julie Fowlis and Muireann Nic Amhlaoibh present highlights from Transatlantic Sessions.
3/4. Coinneach MacLeod explores the food traditions of Lofoten in Norway. Tha Coinneach MacLeòid a' faighinn a-mach mu chultaran a' bhidhe ann an Lofoten ann a Nirribhidh.
18/33. An neach-ciùil blues iongantach, Muireann Bradley, le seisean acoustic aig Belladrum 2025. Teenage blues sensation Muireann Bradley performs an acoustic session.
3/6. Coinneach MacFhraing make his first trip to the Island of Arran and enjoys discovering some of its ridges and precipices.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
Sealladh ùr bho Alba. A new view from Scotland.
33/52. Chan eil AH-AH ann an deagh shunnd an-diugh agus, gu dearbh', tha e gabhaltach. AH-AH isn't in a good mood and it seems to be contagious.
9/52. Tha Posy ag iarraidh itealag Pip fheuchainn ach chan eil cùisean a dol leatha! Posy want to try Pip's kite but things don't go her way!
10/52. Tha Pip is Posy a' togail shadhbhaidhean ach chan eil iad idir rèidh le chèile. Pip and Posy are den-building, but they're not getting on with one another.
...Adventures of Abney & Teal. 30/52. Teal is having a lovely time in the flowers that are blooming all over the island. She brings a bunch to Abney, but they make him sneeze again and again!
14/26. Tha deagh chabhag air na seanganan an-diugh. The ants are in a great hurry today.
1/26. While out picking blackberries, Célestine finds an old mill covered in ivy. Ernest claims that the building is haunted. Instead of scaring Célestine, it piques her curiosity.
82/82. A bedtime story for young children. Fiona MacKenzie reads Trì Muncaidhean Beaga by Quentin Blake, illustrated by Emma Chichester Clark and translated into Gaelic by Jo MacDonald.
...Ploc/The Rubbish World of Dave Spud. 45/52. Following an incident with the school photocopier, Dave must round up a horde of photocopied baby Spud twins.
8/13. Tha Daibhidh a' fulang bho throm-laighe - is cò a th' anns an nighean ùr? Daibhidh is suffering from nightmares. And who is the new girl?
2/2. Calum Macdonald introduces his personal highlights from the craziest news show on BBC ALBA!
4/6. Chan eil duine sam bith a' leantainn nan siostaman ùra aig Ciorstaidh agus chan eil i idir toilichte. No one is following Ciorstaidh's new systems, and she isn't happy about it.
2/6. Those story of blind golfers who play for Scotland, and we follow European Tour player Laura Murray through more of her training.
9/13. North Uist native and learner John Gillies chats to Joy, and a hungry Calum Maclean is on a quest for a mouthwatering cheese course at a family dairy in Easter Ross.
Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach là cuide ri fiosrachadh coimhearsnachd bho BBC ALBA. Local, national and international news and information from BBC ALBA.
4/12. Niall Iain Macdonald hosts a quiz show where two teams go head-to-head to win a cash prize. Niall Iain Dòmhnallach le farpais cheist ùr is dà sgioba a' strì airson duais airgid.
1/3. Anne Lundon hears about acid rain, first identified after the Industrial Revolution.
2/3. Turas fèin-aithne dha boireannach Dhubh tar-ghnèitheach ann am Brasil. A journey of self-discovery for a black trans woman in Brazil.
13/33. An seinneadair aithnichte Albannach Rianne Downey le seisean acoustic aig Belladrum 2025. Acclaimed Scottish singer Rianne Downey performs an acoustic session at Belladrum.
2/13. Drama Gàidhlig stèidhichte ann an Leòdhas. Gaelic soap based on the Isle of Lewis.
10/10. A writer is experiencing a dry spell, but one night he gets inspiration from a dream and rushes to write it down.
5/6. Iain MacKinnon reads excerpts from Gliocas bhon Bhìoball by Donald Saunders, and Mairi MacInnes narrates from The Mother's Catechism.
